'''Raven Base''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base located on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. It was destroyed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and his forces during the [[Evacuation of Yavin]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. It was located close to [[Falcon Base]].

It contained three [[Barracks/Legends|troop centers]], a [[Power core/Legends|power core]], a [[Factory/Legends|mech factory]], and two [[Prefab shelter]]s.

==Behind the scenes==
Raven Base appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]] during the Darth Vader campaign.
